title: Overnight Protein Rolled Oats
description: A creamy overnight oats recipe with rolled oats, Greek yogurt, chia seeds, hemp seeds, and fresh berries for a high-protein breakfast.

ingredients.note: optional; avoid sugar or honey if preferred

steps: Combine the rolled oats, milk, Greek yogurt or hung curd, chia seeds, hemp seeds, pumpkin seeds, and stevia in a jar or bowl.
Mix well until everything is evenly combined.
Cover and refrigerate overnight or for at least 6 hours.
Top with walnuts and fresh berries before serving. Add a splash of milk if you prefer a thinner consistency.
